titleStmt.title: SII 24.135: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 135. (A.R. No. 75 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Begins with the praśasti Puyal vāyttu. The record is incomplete. Seems to record an endowment by •• kaṉ Sēnāpati Āḻvāṉ Aḻagiya-maṇavāḷapperumāḷ for the sacred bath and offerings to the deity in the name of Śi(Śrī) Puṇḍarīkaṉ on special festival days in the months of Aippaśi and Paṅguṉi. The record is dated in the third regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrī . puyalvāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāytta tirumakaḷum
ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟaṉtu vāḻa veṇmatipol kuṭai viḷaṅka velventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa ma
nu nīti taḻait toṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolum tikkanaittuñ cela naṭappa kaṟpakālam puvikākka t tārāka kayaltāṅkip poṟpamai
nta muṭi puṉaintu cempon vīrasiṅṅāsaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruṉ taruḷiya kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa
tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu nāḷ Āritan ci
kaṉ cenāpati Āḻvāṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ Aṟpacittirunāḷilum paṅkuṉit tirunāḷilum tirumuḷai nāḷilum
tirumañcaṉam paṇṇiyaruḷi tiruvārātaṉaṅ koṇṭaruḷi Amutu ceytārum cipuṇṭarīkaṉ ciṟappukku nāḷ 1- kku
ppaḻa AriciLeft incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 24.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
